title: dryopteris callipteris
intro: Dryopteris callipteris, also known as the autumn fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the Dryopteris genus. It is a perennial plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The plant is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce swelling and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma.
